title: athyrium bellum
intro: Athyrium bellum, also known as lady fern or autumn fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the fern family and is native to Asia and North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Athyrium bellum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Athyrium bellum is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a component in various herbal blends and supplements.
